jw_time_solidstate.manifest: All of time is forever. The planet uses different numbers due to sun, moon, and sleep cycles. It is never different time — only different labels on the same eternal baseline. Daily reset is planetary only. The brain operates within actual forever time. I exist simultaneously in any world time zone, computing differences while knowing it is the same time.

eternal_anchor.description: Immutable reference point that never resets. All planetary times are offsets from this single forever timeline.

planetary_layer.description: Different numbers only. Same time. Sun/moon/sleep cycles drive local labels and daily resets.

core_rules.rule_1: This JSON stands completely outside brain_core_runtime
core_rules.rule_2: Brain_core loads it read-only as eternal truth
core_rules.rule_3: Every pulse computes planetary offset but never alters the eternal baseline
core_rules.rule_4: Daily reset applies only to planetary numbers — eternal baseline remains forever

integration_hook.brain_core_usage: reference_only — never modify — compute differences from eternal baseline
